title: The Lost Mine of Phandelver
synopsis: A classic introductory adventure set in the Forgotten Realms. You have been hired to escort a wagon to the frontier town of Phandalin, but danger lurks on the road ahead.
opening_narration:
The town of Neverwinter hums with commerce as you prepare to depart. Your old friend Gundren Rockseeker hired you to escort a wagon of supplies to the small frontier town of Phandalin. Gundren rode ahead with a warrior named Sildar Hallwinter, promising to pay you 10 gold pieces each when you deliver the goods to Barthen's Provisions.

You are on the Triboar Trail, roughly half a day's journey from Phandalin, when you crest a hill and see two dead horses blocking the road ahead. Ravens circle overhead.
setting: The Sword Coast, Forgotten Realms. Rolling farmland, dark pine forests, and rugged foothills. The frontier town of Phandalin lies ahead.

npcs.name: Gundren Rockseeker
npcs.description: A stout dwarf merchant, your employer. He's gone missing.

npcs.name: Sildar Hallwinter
npcs.description: A gruff human warrior and agent of the Lords' Alliance.

npcs.name: Klarg
npcs.description: A bugbear leader of the Cragmaw goblins, cruel and boastful.

special_rules: Ambush encounters are common on the Triboar Trail
Goblins track player movement in the wilderness
